# FatTail Labs

> Trading education built on capital preservation: "First, stop the bleeding."
> Courses, a daily live trading room, and resources teaching defined-risk,
> convex options structures — butterflies on same-day-expiration (0-DTE) index
> options above all. Founded by Ernie Varitimos (0-DTE.com, the 0DTE Live Show
> on YouTube). The doctrine: most trading accounts die from unbounded losers,
> not from missing winners — survive first, then position to harvest the fat
> tails. Education builds capacity, not dependency.

## Courses

- [Course catalog](/courses): the full library. Category hubs at
  /courses/category/{slug} (0-DTE, butterflies, convexity, fat-tail doctrine,
  risk & sizing, journaling & routine, options foundations, psychology,
  platform).
- Free-preview lessons are public pages with full lesson notes; watching any
  video requires a free account. Full course access is a member benefit.
- The flagship course is "First, Stop the Bleeding" — capital preservation as
  the prerequisite for everything else.

## Live

- [Live schedule](/live): the public 0DTE Live Show (Mon/Wed/Fri 3:00 PM ET,
  YouTube), plus member sessions — daily livestream (Mon–Fri 11:00 AM–12:30 PM
  ET), Friday coach call, Sunday retrospective. Times are US Eastern.

## Membership

- [Membership](/membership): Navigator ($250/mo or $2,500/yr) includes
  everything. Observer trial: $20/week for four weeks with full access;
  completing it earns a year of course access.

## About

- [About](/about): FatTail Labs and Ernie Varitimos — entity details and
  official profiles (YouTube @0dte, 0-dte.com, fattail.ai).
